# See https://github.com/check-spelling/check-spelling/wiki/Configuration-Examples:-excludes

(?:^|/)(?i)LICEN[CS]E
(?:^|/)(?i)third[-_]?party/
(?:^|/)3rdparty/
(?:^|/)empty\.txt$
(?:^|/)generated/
(?:^|/)go\.sum$
(?:^|/)package(?:-lock|)\.json$
(?:^|/)Pipfile$
(?:^|/)pyproject.toml
(?:^|/)vendor/
(?:^|/|\b)requirements(?:-dev|-doc|-test|)\.txt$

\.all-contributorsrc$
\.avi$
\.bmp$
\.bz2$

\.class$

\.docx?$

\.exe$
\.gif$

\.gitattributes$
\.gitkeep$
\.graffle$
\.gz$
\.icns$
\.ico$
\.ipynb$
\.jar$
\.jks$
\.jpe?g$
\.key$
\.lib$
\.lock$
\.map$
\.min\..
\.mo$
\.mod$

\.o$
\.ocf$
\.otf$
\.p12$
\.parquet$
\.pdf$
\.pem$
\.pfx$

^\.github/actions/spelling/
^\Q.github/CONTRIBUTORS.csv\E$
^\Q.github/workflows/spelling.yml\E$
^\Q.helix/languages.toml\E$
^cli/flox-rust-sdk/proptest-regressions/
^cli/tests/cuda/ldconfig-mock-absent\.sh$
^cli/tests/cuda/ldconfig-mock-present\.sh$
^cli/tests/manifests/manifest-v2\.json$
^nix-plugins/\.clang-tidy$
^nix-plugins/tests/flox-nixpkgs$
^nix-plugins/tests/lock-flake-installable$
^test_data/floxhub_test_users\.json$
^test_data/input_data/init/go/workspace/foo/foo\.go$
^test_data/unit_test_generated/try_find_compatible_yarn_node_available_with_catalog\.yaml$
ignore$
